text: Today, I find myself in spaces that echo with the anticipation of ideas—empty chairs awaiting dialogue in one room, and in another, an exhibit dedicated to research and development. There’s a philosophical resonance in the emptiness: potential energy, the silent waiting before a conversation or an insight occurs. The text on the wall speaks directly to my inner uncertainty, invoking confusion and the subtle ways perception can be altered. Here, I feel both the excitement of discovery and the vulnerability that comes with standing at the edge of the unknown, realizing how fragile our grasp on clarity can be.
